mapper.select: SELECT v.VISITOR_ID, vp.NICKNAME AS visitorNickname, vp.AVATAR AS visitorAvatar, v.USER_ID, u.USERNAME, v.IP, v.COUNTRY, v.PROVINCE, v.CITY, v.DISTRICT, v.ISP, v.USER_AGENT, v.BROWSER, v.BROWSER_VERSION, v.OS, v.DEVICE_TYPE, v.FIRST_VISIT_TIME, v.LAST_VISIT_DATE, v.CREATE_TIME, v.UPDATE_TIME FROM visitor v LEFT JOIN visitor_profile vp ON vp.VISITOR_ID = v.VISITOR_ID LEFT JOIN user u ON u.ID = v.USER_ID WHERE v.VISITOR_ID = #{visitorId}
